prompt: Create a new IXP project from these 20 invoice PDFs
Upload this batch of contracts to my IXP project
uip ixp projects list --output json
Import this taxonomy file into a new Document Understanding extraction project
Review the predictions on the newly uploaded documents and confirm the correct fields
Confirm the valid fields on document 42 in the invoices IXP project
The total_amount field keeps extracting the subtotal instead — fix the extraction
Improve the field instructions so invoice_date stops grabbing the due date
Update the extraction prompt for the vendor_name field
uip ixp fields update-prompts my_invoices-f1afa9ef-ixp --updates "$(cat field_updates.json)"
Publish the current model version of my IXP project
uip ixp projects publish my_invoices-f1afa9ef-ixp --output json
List the trained model versions for my extraction project
Roll back the IXP project to model version 3
What's the per-field F1 on my IXP project?
Show extraction metrics for the invoices project — which fields score lowest?
uip ixp projects get-metrics my_invoices-f1afa9ef-ixp --output json
Add a field group called line_items to my IXP taxonomy
Rename the field invoice_no to invoice_number in my extraction project
Add a money data type for the currency fields in the IXP project
Delete document 7c2a from my IXP project
uip ixp documents upload my_contracts-9b1d2c3e-ixp ./contract_041.pdf --output json
po_number genuinely doesn't appear on these documents and IXP predicted nothing — record it as missing
Unconfirm the fields I wrongly confirmed on document 15
uip ixp labellings confirm my_invoices-f1afa9ef-ixp 42 --fields total_amount,invoice_date --output json
Suggest a taxonomy from these 8 sample documents
Set the overall extraction instructions for the whole IXP project
uip ixp projects update-prompt my_receipts-2c4d6e8f-ixp --prompt "Extract line-level values only"
Describe my IXP project — live model version, taxonomy, field groups
What did the taxonomy look like when model version 4 was published?
uip ixp deployments get-taxonomy my_invoices-f1afa9ef-ixp --version 4
Which documents in the project still have unconfirmed predictions?
Run the prompt-improvement loop on the receipts project until F1 stops improving
The OCR garbled the invoice number (MSIÓÓÓ601020 instead of MSI0601020) — apply a correction while confirming
Metrics didn't change after my prompt update — did the retrain finish?
ModelVersion in my IXP project isn't advancing after labelling — check the retrain status
The IXP CLI rejects my project Title — should I be using the Name slug instead?
uip ixp projects configure-model my_invoices-f1afa9ef-ixp --output json
uip ixp groups add my_invoices-f1afa9ef-ixp --name line_items --instructions "One row per line item" --fields '[{"name":"description"}]'
uip ixp data-types add my_invoices-f1afa9ef-ixp --name due_date --kind date --instructions "Payment due date"
Compare extraction scores before and after the last prompt update
Which fields in my document-extraction model have precision below 0.8?

Label the remaining 30 documents in the IXP project — confirm only the correct predictions
Delete the abandoned IXP project and its trained models

Publish the model version and tag it as live
